findings.evidence: The discount calculation (memberTier × category → discount rate) is duplicated across CartService.calculateTotal (lines 11-15) and InvoiceService.generateLineItems (lines 27-31) — if the gold/electronics rate changes in one, the other silently drifts.
findings.minimal_fix: Extract a DiscountPolicy object (or top-level function) that maps (memberTier, category) → discount rate, and call it from both services.
findings.verification: Add a test that asserts CartService and InvoiceService produce identical per-item prices for the same input, then change the gold rate in DiscountPolicy and confirm both services reflect the change.

findings.evidence: No tests verify that CartService and InvoiceService agree on discount calculations — a regression in one would go undetected.
findings.minimal_fix: Add parameterized tests covering gold/silver × electronics/non-electronics for both services and assert price parity.
findings.verification: Run the discount test suite and confirm all tier × category combinations pass for both services.
